name: mac-todolist
description: A focused macOS desktop TodoList app.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer.js
scripts.lint: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer.js
scripts.dist: npm run prepare:dist && npm run icon && npm run check && ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-cache ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.builder-cache electron_config_cache=$PWD/.electron-cache npm_config_cache=$PWD/.npm-cache electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never && node scripts/finalize-dist.js
